responses.title: Gautam Kumar
responses.summary: Gautam Kumar is an AI engineer and full-stack developer in Bengaluru, India. He builds practical intelligent systems, typed React interfaces, backend-oriented workflows, and recruiter-facing product experiences.
bullets: Primary roles: AI Engineer, Full Stack Developer, System Builder, Problem Solver.
Mission: make complex work understandable, capable, and calm through useful technology.
Education signal: B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering, expected graduation 2027.

responses.title: Project intelligence
responses.summary: Gautam's project layer focuses on applied AI, computer vision, backend intelligence, and full-stack product systems.
bullets: AI Meeting & Lecture Note Taker: transforms spoken sessions into structured notes and summaries.
Helmet Violation Detection System: computer vision pipeline for rider safety compliance.
Wildlife Conservation & Species Identification: confidence-ranked image intelligence for conservation workflows.
AI Plant Disease Detection: image-based crop health screening with practical guidance.
CrowdScope Crowd Monitoring System: density and safety awareness concept for operational dashboards.

responses.title: AI project signal
responses.summary: The AI work is centered on useful workflows rather than model demos: summarization, transcription, object detection, classification, and confidence-aware interfaces.
bullets: AI Meeting & Lecture Note Taker uses transcription and LLM-style summarization workflows.
Helmet Violation Detection applies YOLOv8 and OpenCV for object detection.
Wildlife Species Identification and Plant Disease Detection use computer vision classification patterns.
CrowdScope connects AI-assisted counting signals with backend and dashboard architecture.
